detail.description: Connor Norby singles on a fly ball to left fielder Casey Schmitt.

Marlins challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Marlins challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Connor Norby doubles (7) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Felix Reyes.
